data.title: Oculis to Participate in Upcoming Investor Conferences
data.description: In Zug, Switzerland on March 5, 2026, Oculis Holding AG (Nasdaq: OCS; XICE: OCS), a leading global biopharmaceutical company specializing in solutions for ophthalmic and neuro-ophthalmic conditions with high medical demand, declared that the Company’s executives will engage in various investor conferences during March.
Details of a share buyback transaction from February 27 to March 4, 2026.

data.title: Oculis Publishes 2025 Consolidated Financial Statements
data.description: ZUG, Switzerland – On March 5, 2026, the Company released audited consolidated financial statements for the fiscal year 2025, as well as the MD&A. They have been submitted to the SEC on form 20-F. The documents are now available for review post the press release issued by the Company on March 3.

data.title: Qfin Holdings to Announce Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Unaudited Financial Results on March 17, 2026
data.description: In Shanghai, China, on March 05, 2026, Qfin Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: QFIN; HKEx: 3660), a prominent AI-driven Credit-Tech platform in China, revealed plans to disclose its unaudited financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2025. The announcement is scheduled post U.S. market closure on Tuesday, March 17, 2026.

data.title: 464 Italian Wine Ambassadors Worldwide and Counting: Inside the Gold Standard of Italian Wine Certification
data.description: The 34th edition of the flagship Italian Wine Ambassador course by the Vinitaly International Academy is scheduled to take place in Verona from April 15-19, 2026. This program is organized by Veronafiere in collaboration with ITA - Italian Trade Agency.

data.title: XPENG to Report Fourth Quarter and Fiscal Year 2025 Financial Results on Friday, March 20, 2026
data.description: XPeng Inc., a prominent global AI mobility technology company, has disclosed that it will report its fourth-quarter earnings during an earnings call set for 8:00 a.m. Eastern Time on March 20, 2026. The announcement was made on March 5, 2026, from GUANGZHOU, China. The company is listed on the NYSE as XPEV and on the HKEX as 9868.

data.title: Swift Accelerates Transformation of Consumer Payments as Banks Roll Out New Framework for Retail Transactions
data.description: Consumers and small businesses in various countries, including five major remittance markets, are set to experience enhanced cross-border retail payments as Swift and banks worldwide launch an innovative framework. This initiative aims to provide faster, more affordable, and predictable payment processing. Noteworthy markets that will benefit initially include Australia, Bangladesh, Canada, China, Germany, India, Pakistan, Spain, and Thailand. The new system is expected to bring significant improvements to global remittances and small-scale international transactions.
